fontStack: Geist + Geist Mono — Google Fonts, added via index.html <link>
palette: CSS custom properties in src/index.css — replacing blue neumorphic with Coral OKLCH tokens
motion: No motion libraries — framer-motion, gsap not installed. Motion-cut project.
spacing: Custom property scale being introduced (4pt base, --space-* tokens)
framework: React 19 + Vite 8, no router library (state-based views)
notes: Coral theme (modern-minimal genre). Warm-grey paper, coral accent, Geist throughout.
